title: Ornith (35B,9B) + Hermes,Zed: THE FULLY PRIVATE LOCAL AGENT is ACTUALLY HERE!
summary: Ornith is an open-source family of agentic coding models from DeepReinforce, with sizes ranging from 9B to 397B parameters. The models are built on Gemma and Qwen, focus on tool use and agent workflows, and include MIT-licensed GGUF versions for local deployment.
writeup: The video covers Ornith, a new family of open agentic coding models from DeepReinforce that ranges from 9B to 397B parameters and is built on Gemma and Qwen. The models target coding and tool use, and they learn their own scaffolding for planning, retries, and testing. It highlights the 35B and 9B variants as practical for local deployment, with GGUF versions available. The framing is local, private agentic coding, paired with Hermes and Zed.
